tools.name: get_availability
tools.description: Free appointment slots for the vertebrologist (Chernivtsi). Optional date (YYYY-MM-DD): without it — all nearest available days. Read-only (does not book).

tools.name: get_doctor_info
tools.description: About the vertebrologist: specialty, what he treats, address, slot length, rules (one appointment per day), and how to book.

tools.name: list_current_bookings
tools.description: The user's current/upcoming appointments (booking_id, date, time, status), nearest first. Cancelled ones are ALSO shown — tell them apart by the status field ('booked' | 'cancelled'). Needed to reschedule/cancel. Requires authorization.

tools.name: list_past_bookings
tools.description: The user's past appointments (booking_id, date, time, status), most recent first. limit (default 20) and offset for pagination. Cancelled ones are ALSO shown — by the status field. Requires authorization.

tools.name: book
tools.description: REAL action (not a simulation): creates a real appointment with the vertebrologist on the user's behalf. Requires the user's CONSENT — authorization via Telegram (OAuth, scope booking:write). date (YYYY-MM-DD), time (HH:MM). One appointment per day.

tools.name: reschedule
tools.description: REAL action: moves the user's appointment to another free slot the SAME day, ATOMICALLY — if the target slot was just taken, the user KEEPS their current slot (never loses the held slot; that atomic guarantee is the whole point of same-day move). For a DIFFERENT day, just call book instead (a fresh

tools.name: cancel
tools.description: REAL action: cancels the user's appointment by booking_id (from list_current_bookings) IMMEDIATELY — no confirmation step. If the user said cancel, cancel; do NOT re-ask (repeated confirmations frustrate users — act decisively). On success returns cancelled=true with the booking_id; on failure retur

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "list_current_bookings" references sensitive artifacts (authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "cancel" stacks urgency/override words (immediately, never). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.
